allow: Bash(grep -n "阅读卡片\\|对比矩阵" research_agent/skills/*.py)
Bash(python -c "from research_agent.agent import ResearchAgent; agent = ResearchAgent\(\); print\('Registered skills:', list\(agent.registry.skills.keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from research_agent.agent import ResearchAgent; agent = ResearchAgent\(\); print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(agent.registry.skills.keys\(\)\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from research_agent.agent import ResearchAgent; agent = ResearchAgent\(\); print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(agent.registry._skills.keys\(\)\)\)\)")
